generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SensorReadings : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series sensor readings including swing angle and wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created in Autodesk Fusion360 for lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance SystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System architecture model created using Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for service isolation and deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing sensor data, trajectory logs, and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, ContinuousValidationService, DashboardService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for dashboarding"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for inter-service communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, DashboardService, DatabaseService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller processing sensor data from Swing Angle Encoder and Anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplication
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for creating physical system models"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modeling tool for system architecture design"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight, ControlDecisionAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane and controller behavior for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulations and triggers alerts for faults"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes validation results and trajectory traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores time-series data including sensor readings and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageAction
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Handles MQTT communication between services"
    DTDFVocab:provides MessageTransmissionAction
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs sensor data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup at the end of the hoist"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for minimizing residual swinging"
]

instance ControlDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Informs control decisions to minimize residual swinging"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for faults based on validation results"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of validation results and trajectory traces"
]

instance DataStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Stores historical data in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MessageTransmissionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmits messages between services via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for validation and analysis"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:contains DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, Arduino, TimescaleDB, Grafana, MQTTBroker, Gantrylib, Fusion360, Capella
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal movement trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent to the physical crane via the Control Application's Python interface, which interfaces with the motor controllers."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization with real-time data processing; Continuous Validation Service operates in real-time, comparing executed trajectories against simulations with immediate threshold checks."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture where physical crane components interact with digital services via MQTT and database; all digital components run on a single PC, orchestrated through Docker containers and Python modules."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Designed phase (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and operated phase (real-time monitoring, validation, and control during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between measured trajectories and simulations; thresholds determine validity, with breaches triggering operator notifications via the dashboard; model validation techniques reused from prior research."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for real-time communication between physical crane interface and digital services; data logged to TimescaleDB for persistent storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital components containerized via Docker; deployed on a single personal computer using docker-compose for orchestration; no cloud infrastructure used."
]
